rules.rule: every export contract MUST cite contract_id, manual_id, package_id, export_kind ∈ EXPORT_KINDS, reviewer, reasoning_chain.
export_kind MUST be one of {raw-html-export, structured-json-export, semantic-markdown-export}.
exports MUST be presentation-neutral; CSS injection, breakpoints, screen-size optimization, frontend-rendering hints are FORBIDDEN.
exports MUST cite the source package_id; orphan contracts BLOCK approval (PI-7).
rendered payload sha256 MUST be deterministic; mismatch on replay is fail-closed (PR-2).
exports preserve lineage and trust_composition; redaction or restructuring of lineage is FORBIDDEN.
exports are append-only; in-place mutation is FORBIDDEN.
raw-html-export MUST emit only semantic HTML5 tags (article/section/h1-h6/ol/ul/li/p/figure/table); class attributes, style attributes, breakpoints, and inline CSS are FORBIDDEN.
